spec_match.rationale: Expertly demonstrates unit casting and cancellation (length/length -> number, em/em -> percent) across dial rotation, RGB channels, and CSS counters.

interactive.rationale: Sliders instantly update dial rotation, RGB swatch values, and CSS counter-based numeric displays.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly fulfills the promised conversions and displays of dial, swatch, ruler, and CSS counters.

edge_cases.rationale: Exhibits a clever feature-probing test that reads computed styles directly in JS to evaluate CSS support.

references.rationale: Includes accurate reference links to the ChromeStatus feature and the Values 4 spec.

design_system.rationale: Completely aligns with standard style.css layout, spacing, and theme tokens.

summary: An outstanding, highly educational unit conversion playground showing four distinct cross-unit calculations. It uses dial rotations, dynamic RGB background updates, and a gorgeous CSS counter trick to display computed variables on the page without JS layout queries.
